overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character running through deep snow in a mountainous forest at night. The character traverses from a rocky wooded area into an open snow field under moonlight, with snow-covered pine trees lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain forest path with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: running steadily through deep snow between rocky terrain and dense pine trees, leaving a trail in the fresh powder

entered.detail: large dark rock formation covered in snow, towering over the left side of the path
dense cluster of snow-laden evergreen trees forming the left boundary of the forest
thick stand of snow-covered pine trees on the right side of the path
deep snow covering the mountain path, showing footprints and disturbed powder

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character running through a narrow snowy mountain path. A rocky outcrop looms on the left while dense snow-covered pine trees line both sides of the trail. The night sky is partially visible through the tree canopy, casting blue-tinted moonlight across the snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding snow path through coniferous forest

events.description: passing the rocky outcrop and entering a more defined forest path with trees on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the winding snow path as the forest thins slightly and the trail curves gently

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the forest along a winding snow path, leaving the rocky outcrop behind. The pine trees remain visible on both sides but appear further away as the path opens slightly. The snow continues to show the character's trail as they navigate the gentle curves of the mountain trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field on mountain slope with distant ridge

events.description: emerging from the tree line into a wide open snow field with clear view of the mountain ridge ahead

agents.ego_description: running uphill through the open snow field toward the distant mountain ridge, with no tree cover

entered.detail: distant snow-covered mountain ridge silhouetted against the night sky at the top of the slope
gentle snow-covered hillside rising on the left side of the open field
snow-covered hillside rising on the right side, creating a valley-like passage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest into a vast open snow field, with the sky fully visible overhead. The dense pine trees fall away to reveal snow-covered slopes on both sides and a distant mountain ridge ahead. The character continues running uphill through the exposed snow toward the ridge line under the moonlit sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs from a confined, wooded mountain path into a vast, moonlit open snow field. It begins with a third-person view navigating a narrow trail flanked by a rocky outcrop and dense, snow-covered pine trees under a blue-tinted night sky. As the character moves deeper into the forest, the rocky terrain recedes and the path winds through the trees, which gradually spread apart to open the vista. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the forest canopy, leaving the dense pines behind to reveal wide, snow-covered slopes. Finally, the camera follows the character running uphill across the exposed expanse toward a distant mountain ridge under the full glow of the moonlight.
